entities.name: INNOVATION PLATFORMS
entities.description: A mechanism where stakeholders learn, negotiate, and coordinate to overcome challenges and capture opportunities to achieve development outcomes

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH FOR DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Projects and programmes focused on integrating research into agricultural development

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL DEVELOPMENT OUTCOMES
entities.description: The intended results and improvements in the agricultural sector resulting from development initiatives

entities.name: FACILITATED INNOVATION PROCESS
entities.description: A structured process used within innovation platforms to coordinate stakeholders and capture opportunities

entities.name: EX-ANTE APPRAISAL
entities.description: The preliminary evaluation of whether innovation platforms are an appropriate mechanism for specific development goals

entities.name: RESOURCE INVESTMENTS
entities.description: The human and financial resources necessary to implement and sustain innovation platforms

entities.name: ENABLING ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: The external conditions and supportive frameworks required for innovation platforms to be effective

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL SECTOR
entities.description: The broad domain of agricultural activities and the associated challenges and constraints

entities.name: DECISION SUPPORT TOOL
entities.description: A tool designed to help research, development, and funding agencies determine the appropriate use of innovation platforms
